title: [LV] Support conditional scalar assignments of masked operations
author: MacDue

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @csa_find_last_phi_use_iv(ptr noalias %mask, ptr noalias %src, ptr noalias %b, i64 %N) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ %iv.next, %latch ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %lastsum.0 = phi i32 [ %lastsum.1, %latch ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %mask.ptr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %mask, i64 %iv
  %mask.val = load i32, ptr %mask.ptr, align 4
  %tobool.not = icmp eq i32 %mask.val, 0
  br i1 %tobool.not, label %latch, label %cond.assign

cond.assign:                                      ; preds = %loop
  %b.ptr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i8, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %b.val = load i8, ptr %b.ptr, align 1
  %zext.b = zext i8 %b.val to i32
  %trunc.iv = trunc nuw nsw i64 %iv to i32
  %add.iv = add nuw nsw i32 %trunc.iv, %zext.b
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %cond.assign, %loop
  %lastsum.1 = phi i32 [ %add.iv, %cond.assign ], [ %lastsum.0, %loop ]
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %lastsum.1
}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @find_last_phi_fed_into_find_last_select(ptr noalias %a, ptr noalias %b, ptr noalias %c, i32 %default_val, i64 %N, i32 %threshold) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  %data.phi = phi i32 [ %default_val, %entry ], [ %select.data.1, %latch ]
  %a.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %ld.a = load i32, ptr %a.addr, align 4
  %if.cond = icmp sgt i32 %ld.a, %threshold
  br i1 %if.cond, label %if.then, label %latch

if.then:                                          ; preds = %loop
  %b.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %ld.b = load i32, ptr %b.addr, align 4
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if.then, %loop
  %select.data = phi i32 [ %ld.b, %if.then ], [ %data.phi, %loop ]
  %c.addr = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %c, i64 %iv
  %ld.c = load i32, ptr %c.addr, align 4
  %select.cmp = icmp slt i32 %ld.a, %ld.c
  %select.data.1 = select i1 %select.cmp, i32 %select.data, i32 %data.phi
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exit.cmp = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exit.cmp, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %select.data.1
}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @simple_csa_int_divide(ptr noalias %a, ptr noalias %b, i32 %default_val, i64 %N, i32 %threshold) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  %data.phi = phi i32 [ %default_val, %entry ], [ %select.data, %latch ]
  %a.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %ld.a = load i32, ptr %a.addr, align 4
  %if.cond = icmp sgt i32 %ld.a, %threshold
  br i1 %if.cond, label %if.then, label %latch

if.then:                                          ; preds = %loop
  %div = sdiv i32 42, %ld.a
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if.then, %loop
  %select.data = phi i32 [ %div, %if.then ], [ %data.phi, %loop ]
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exit.cmp = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exit.cmp, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %select.data
}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @chained_csa_int_load(ptr noalias %a, ptr noalias %b, ptr noalias %c, i32 %default_val, i64 %N, i32 %threshold) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  %data.phi = phi i32 [ %default_val, %entry ], [ %select.data.1, %latch ]
  %a.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %ld.a = load i32, ptr %a.addr, align 4
  %if.cond.0 = icmp sgt i32 %ld.a, %threshold
  br i1 %if.cond.0, label %if.then.0, label %if.end.0

if.then.0:                                        ; preds = %loop
  %b.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %ld.b = load i32, ptr %b.addr, align 4
  br label %if.end.0

if.end.0:                                         ; preds = %if.then.0, %loop
  %select.data.0 = phi i32 [ %ld.b, %if.then.0 ], [ %data.phi, %loop ]
  %if.cond.1 = icmp sgt i32 %ld.a, 100
  br i1 %if.cond.1, label %if.then.1, label %latch

if.then.1:                                        ; preds = %if.end.0
  %c.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %c, i64 %iv
  %ld.c = load i32, ptr %c.addr, align 4
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if.then.1, %if.end.0
  %select.data.1 = phi i32 [ %ld.c, %if.then.1 ], [ %select.data.0, %if.end.0 ]
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exit.cmp = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exit.cmp, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %select.data.1
}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @csa_load_nested_ifs(ptr noalias %a, ptr noalias %b, i32 %default_val, i64 %N, i32 %threshold) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  %data.phi = phi i32 [ %default_val, %entry ], [ %select.data, %latch ]
  %outer.if.cond = icmp ult i64 %iv, 100
  br i1 %outer.if.cond, label %outer.if.then, label %latch

outer.if.then:                                    ; preds = %loop
  %a.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %ld.a = load i32, ptr %a.addr, align 4
  %if.cond = icmp sgt i32 %ld.a, %threshold
  br i1 %if.cond, label %if.then, label %latch

if.then:                                          ; preds = %outer.if.then
  %b.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %ld.b = load i32, ptr %b.addr, align 4
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if.then, %outer.if.then, %loop
  %select.data = phi i32 [ %ld.b, %if.then ], [ %data.phi, %loop ], [ %data.phi, %outer.if.then ]
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exit.cmp = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exit.cmp, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %select.data
}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @csa_multiple_find_last_phi_reductions(ptr noalias %mask, ptr noalias %a, ptr noalias %b, i64 %N) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ %iv.next, %latch ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %last_a.0 = phi i32 [ %last_a.1, %latch ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %last_b.0 = phi i32 [ %last_b.1, %latch ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %mask.ptr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %mask, i64 %iv
  %mask.val = load i32, ptr %mask.ptr, align 4
  %tobool.not = icmp eq i32 %mask.val, 0
  br i1 %tobool.not, label %latch, label %cond.assign

cond.assign:                                      ; preds = %loop
  %a.ptr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i8, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %a.val = load i8, ptr %a.ptr, align 1
  %a.zext = zext i8 %a.val to i32
  %b.ptr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i8, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %b.val = load i8, ptr %b.ptr, align 1
  %b.zext = zext i8 %b.val to i32
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %cond.assign, %loop
  %last_a.1 = phi i32 [ %a.zext, %cond.assign ], [ %last_a.0, %loop ]
  %last_b.1 = phi i32 [ %b.zext, %cond.assign ], [ %last_b.0, %loop ]
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  %xor = xor i32 %last_b.1, %last_a.1
  ret i32 %xor
}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @simple_csa_int_load_multi_user(ptr noalias %a, ptr noalias %b, ptr noalias %results, i32 %default_val, i64 %N, i32 %threshold) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  %data.phi = phi i32 [ %default_val, %entry ], [ %select.data, %latch ]
  %a.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %ld.a = load i32, ptr %a.addr, align 4
  %if.cond = icmp sgt i32 %ld.a, %threshold
  br i1 %if.cond, label %if.then, label %latch

if.then:                                          ; preds = %loop
  %b.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %ld.b = load i32, ptr %b.addr, align 4
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if.then, %loop
  %select.data = phi i32 [ %ld.b, %if.then ], [ %data.phi, %loop ]
  %res.addr = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %results, i64 %iv
  store i32 %select.data, ptr %res.addr, align 4
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exit.cmp = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exit.cmp, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %select.data
}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @simple_csa_int_load(ptr noalias %a, ptr noalias %b, i32 %default_val, i64 %N, i32 %threshold) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  %data.phi = phi i32 [ %default_val, %entry ], [ %select.data, %latch ]
  %a.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %ld.a = load i32, ptr %a.addr, align 4
  %if.cond = icmp sgt i32 %ld.a, %threshold
  br i1 %if.cond, label %if.then, label %latch

if.then:                                          ; preds = %loop
  %b.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %ld.b = load i32, ptr %b.addr, align 4
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if.then, %loop
  %select.data = phi i32 [ %ld.b, %if.then ], [ %data.phi, %loop ]
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exit.cmp = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exit.cmp, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %select.data
}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @csa_find_last_phi_use_other_reduction(ptr noalias %mask, ptr noalias %src, ptr noalias %b, i64 %N) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ %iv.next, %latch ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %sum = phi i32 [ %add.src, %latch ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %lastsum.0 = phi i32 [ %lastsum.1, %latch ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %mask.ptr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %mask, i64 %iv
  %mask.val = load i32, ptr %mask.ptr, align 4
  %tobool.not = icmp eq i32 %mask.val, 0
  br i1 %tobool.not, label %latch, label %cond.assign

cond.assign:                                      ; preds = %loop
  %b.ptr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i8, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %b.val = load i8, ptr %b.ptr, align 1
  %zext.b = zext i8 %b.val to i32
  %add.b = add nuw nsw i32 %sum, %zext.b
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %cond.assign, %loop
  %lastsum.1 = phi i32 [ %add.b, %cond.assign ], [ %lastsum.0, %loop ]
  %src.ptr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i8, ptr %src, i64 %iv
  %src.val = load i8, ptr %src.ptr, align 1
  %zext.src = zext i8 %src.val to i32
  %add.src = add nuw nsw i32 %sum, %zext.src
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %lastsum.1
}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @csa_load_used_in_add_reduction(ptr noalias %a, ptr noalias %b, i32 %default_val, i64 %N, i32 %threshold) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  %data.phi = phi i32 [ %default_val, %entry ], [ %select.data, %latch ]
  %sum.phi = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %add, %latch ]
  %a.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %ld.a = load i32, ptr %a.addr, align 4
  %if.cond = icmp sgt i32 %ld.a, %threshold
  br i1 %if.cond, label %if.then, label %latch

if.then:                                          ; preds = %loop
  %b.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %ld.b = load i32, ptr %b.addr, align 4
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if.then, %loop
  %select.data = phi i32 [ %ld.b, %if.then ], [ %data.phi, %loop ]
  %add = add nsw i32 %select.data, %sum.phi
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exit.cmp = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exit.cmp, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %select.data
}

; C/C++ code for tests
; void test(int *A, int Length) {
; #pragma clang loop vectorize(enable) interleave(enable)
;   for (int i = 0; i < Length; i++) {
;     A[i] = i;
;     if (A[i] > Length)
;       break;
;   }
; }
; File, line, and column should match those specified in the metadata

; void test_disabled(int *A, int Length) {
; #pragma clang loop vectorize(disable) interleave(disable)
;   for (int i = 0; i < Length; i++)
;     A[i] = i;
; }

; void test_array_bounds(int *A, int *B, int Length) {
; #pragma clang loop vectorize(enable)
;   for (int i = 0; i < Length; i++)
;     A[i] = A[B[i]];
; }

; int foo();
; void test_multiple_failures(int *A) {
;   int k = 0;
; #pragma clang loop vectorize(enable) interleave(enable)
;   for (int i = 0; i < 1000; i+=A[i]) {
;     if (A[i])
;       k = foo();
;   }
;   return k;
; }

target datalayout = "e-m:o-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

; Function Attrs: nounwind optsize ssp uwtable
define void @_Z4testPii(ptr nocapture %A, i32 %Length) #0 !dbg !4 {
entry:
  %cmp10 = icmp sgt i32 %Length, 0, !dbg !12
  br i1 %cmp10, label %loop, label %exit, !dbg !12, !llvm.loop !14

loop:                                         ; preds = %entry, %loop
  %iv = phi i64 [ %iv.next, %loop ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %A, i64 %iv, !dbg !16
  %0 = trunc i64 %iv to i32, !dbg !16
  %ld = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  store i32 %0, ptr %arrayidx, align 4, !dbg !16, !tbaa !18
  %cmp3 = icmp sle i32 %ld, %Length, !dbg !22
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1, !dbg !12
  %1 = trunc i64 %iv.next to i32
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %1, %Length, !dbg !12
  %or.cond = and i1 %cmp3, %cmp, !dbg !22
  br i1 %or.cond, label %loop, label %exit, !dbg !22

exit:                                          ; preds = %loop, %entry
  ret void, !dbg !24
}


; Function Attrs: nounwind optsize ssp uwtable
define void @_Z13test_disabledPii(ptr nocapture %A, i32 %Length) #0 !dbg !7 {
entry:
  %cmp4 = icmp sgt i32 %Length, 0, !dbg !25
  br i1 %cmp4, label %loop, label %exit, !dbg !25, !llvm.loop !27

loop:                                         ; preds = %entry, %loop

  br i1 %exitcond, label %exit, label %loop, !dbg !25, !llvm.loop !27

exit:                                          ; preds = %loop, %entry

}

define i32 @simple_csa_int_load(ptr noalias %a, ptr noalias %b, i32 %default_val, i64 %N, i32 %threshold) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  %data.phi = phi i32 [ %default_val, %entry ], [ %select.data, %latch ]
  %a.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %ld.a = load i32, ptr %a.addr, align 4
  %if.cond = icmp sgt i32 %ld.a, %threshold
  br i1 %if.cond, label %if.then, label %latch

if.then:                                          ; preds = %loop
  %b.addr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i32, ptr %b, i64 %iv
  %ld.b = load i32, ptr %b.addr, align 4
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if.then, %loop
  %select.data = phi i32 [ %ld.b, %if.then ], [ %data.phi, %loop ]
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exit.cmp = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %N
  br i1 %exit.cmp, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret i32 %select.data
}

comments.author: Kewen12
comments.body:
Hello! This PR breaks our bot for 3rd party library (Kokkos) build with HIP. I can repro this failure locally and resolve by reverting it. I am going to revert this PR to unblock bot, sorry for the interruption.

bot: https://lab.llvm.org/buildbot/#/builders/206/builds/13225

comments.author: MacDue
comments.body:
I see the error is:
```
SplitVectorOperand Op #0: t8: i32 = find_last_active t7

fatal error: error in backend: Do not know how to split this operator's operand!
```
So it looks like it's a simple case of the CostModel not reporting that `find_last_active` is invalid for the target. What is the target triple?

comments.author: fhahn
comments.body:
> I see the error is:
> 
> ```
> SplitVectorOperand Op #0: t8: i32 = find_last_active t7
> 
> fatal error: error in backend: Do not know how to split this operator's operand!
> ```
> 
> So it looks like it's a simple case of the CostModel not reporting that `find_last_active` is invalid for the target. What is the target triple?

There's been a few of issues with `find_last_active` lowering on different platforms, some of which have been fixed earlier, in
https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/175971
https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/174389
https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/174384

Would be good to also make sure the intrinsic can be lowered properly on AMDGPU. @Kewen12 if you could provide a rerpoducer for the ISel crash, that would be quite helpful I think

comments.author: MacDue
comments.body: Note: I've created with implements the missing splitting legalization: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/180290

comments.author: MacDue
comments.body:
> Would be good to also make sure the intrinsic can be lowered properly on AMDGPU

FYI, the actual failure seemed to occur for an x86 compile unit:

```
SplitVectorOperand Op #0: t8: i32 = find_last_active t7

fatal error: error in backend: Do not know how to split this operator's operand!

clang++: error: clang frontend command failed with exit code 70 (use -v to see invocation)
clang version 23.0.0git (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git 0287d789e0e3e3d0828b0b7d81b423d9c0447a0b)
Target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
```
